## PulseBoard Channel Plugin Plan

**25 new files** under `extensions/pulseboard/` — zero modifications to existing files.

### Architecture Decisions

- **Account model**: Scoped multi-account (IRC pattern) — `channels.pulseboard` provides top-level defaults; `channels.pulseboard.accounts.<id>` overrides per account
- **Chat types**: `["direct", "group"]` — DMs to `@username`, board posts to `!board-name`
- **Chunk limit**: 4000 characters via `chunkTextForOutbound`
- **Auth**: API token (stored as secret; also read from `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env var)
- **No `getChatChannelMeta`**: PulseBoard isn't in `src/channels/ids.ts::CHAT_CHANNEL_ORDER`, so plugin meta is supplied inline in `createChatChannelPlugin` (Nostr pattern)
- **`runtime-api.ts`**: Imports directly from existing public SDK subpaths (no `openclaw/plugin-sdk/pulseboard` subpath exists or can be created)

### File Summary

| Layer | Files |
|-------|-------|
| Manifest | `openclaw.plugin.json`, `package.json` |
| Entry points | `index.ts`, `setup-entry.ts` |
| Barrels | `api.ts`, `runtime-api.ts`, `channel-config-api.ts` |
| Core source | `src/types.ts`, `src/accounts.ts`, `src/config-schema.ts`, `src/config-ui-hints.ts`, `src/normalize.ts`, `src/runtime.ts`, `src/policy.ts`, `src/send.ts`, `src/inbound.ts`, `src/monitor.ts`, `src/probe.ts`, `src/setup-core.ts`, `src/setup-surface.ts`, `src/channel.ts` |
| Tests | `src/channel.test.ts`, `src/accounts.test.ts`, `src/normalize.test.ts`, `src/config-schema.test.ts` |

### Key Reference Files
- **Primary template**: `extensions/irc/src/channel.ts` (scoped accounts + group/DM structure)
- **Meta pattern**: `extensions/nostr/src/channel.ts` (inline meta, no `getChatChannelMeta`)
- **SDK subpath source**: `src/plugin-sdk/irc.ts` + `src/plugin-sdk/nostr.ts` (for finding correct import paths)
- **Valid subpaths**: `scripts/lib/plugin-sdk-entrypoints.json`

14	| Chat types | `["direct", "group"]` | DMs to `@username`, board posts to `!board-name` |
15	| Chunk limit | 4000 characters | As specified, via `chunkTextForOutbound` |
16	| Auth | API token (`apiToken` field + `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env) | Simple modern API auth |
17	| Plugin meta | Inline (no `getChatChannelMeta`) | `pulseboard` is not in `CHAT_CHANNEL_ORDER` in core `src/channels/ids.ts` — Nostr uses the same approach |
18	| `runtime-api.ts` | Direct imports from existing SDK subpaths | No `openclaw/plugin-sdk/pulseboard` subpath exists or can be created; map imports to `channel-config-schema`, `direct-dm`, `status-helpers`, `extension-shared`, etc. from `scripts/lib/plugin-sdk-entrypoints.json` |

1	import {
2	  buildChannelConfigSchema,
3	  BlockStreamingCoalesceSchema,
4	  DmConfigSchema,
5	  DmPolicySchema,
6	  GroupPolicySchema,
7	  MarkdownConfigSchema,
8	  ReplyRuntimeConfigSchemaShape,
9	  ToolPolicySchema,
10	  requireOpenAllowFrom,
11	} from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-config-schema";
12	import { z } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/zod";
13	import { ircChannelConfigUiHints } from "./config-ui-hints.js";
14	
15	const IrcGroupSchema = z
16	  .object({
17	    requireMention: z.boolean().optional(),
18	    tools: ToolPolicySchema,
19	    toolsBySender: z.record(z.string(), ToolPolicySchema).optional(),
20	    skills: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
21	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
22	    allowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
23	    systemPrompt: z.string().optional(),
24	  })
25	  .strict();
26	
27	const IrcNickServSchema = z
28	  .object({
29	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
30	    service: z.string().optional(),
31	    password: z.string().optional(),
32	    passwordFile: z.string().optional(),
33	    register: z.boolean().optional(),
34	    registerEmail: z.string().optional(),
35	  })
36	  .strict()
37	  .superRefine((value, ctx) => {
38	    if (value.register && !value.registerEmail?.trim()) {
39	      ctx.addIssue({
40	        code: z.ZodIssueCode.custom,
41	        path: ["registerEmail"],
42	        message: "channels.irc.nickserv.register=true requires channels.irc.nickserv.registerEmail",
43	      });
44	    }
45	  });
46	
47	export const IrcAccountSchemaBase = z
48	  .object({
49	    name: z.string().optional(),
50	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
51	    dangerouslyAllowNameMatching: z.boolean().optional(),
52	    host: z.string().optional(),
53	    port: z.number().int().min(1).max(65535).optional(),
54	    tls: z.boolean().optional(),
55	    nick: z.string().optional(),
56	    username: z.string().optional(),
57	    realname: z.string().optional(),
58	    password: z.string().optional(),
59	    passwordFile: z.string().optional(),
60	    nickserv: IrcNickServSchema.optional(),
61	    dmPolicy: DmPolicySchema.optional().default("pairing"),
62	    allowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
63	    groupPolicy: GroupPolicySchema.optional().default("allowlist"),
64	    groupAllowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
65	    groups: z.record(z.string(), IrcGroupSchema.optional()).optional(),
66	    channels: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
67	    mentionPatterns: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
68	    markdown: MarkdownConfigSchema,
69	    ...ReplyRuntimeConfigSchemaShape,
70	  })
71	  .strict();
72	
73	export const IrcAccountSchema = IrcAccountSchemaBase.superRefine((value, ctx) => {
74	  requireOpenAllowFrom({
75	    policy: value.dmPolicy,
76	    allowFrom: value.allowFrom,
77	    ctx,
78	    path: ["allowFrom"],
79	    message: 'channels.irc.dmPolicy="open" requires channels.irc.allowFrom to include "*"',
80	  });
81	});
82	
83	export const IrcConfigSchema = IrcAccountSchemaBase.extend({
84	  accounts: z.record(z.string(), IrcAccountSchema.optional()).optional(),
85	  defaultAccount: z.string().optional(),
86	}).superRefine((value, ctx) => {
87	  requireOpenAllowFrom({
88	    policy: value.dmPolicy,
89	    allowFrom: value.allowFrom,
90	    ctx,
91	    path: ["allowFrom"],
92	    message: 'channels.irc.dmPolicy="open" requires channels.irc.allowFrom to include "*"',
93	  });
94	});
95	
96	export const IrcChannelConfigSchema = buildChannelConfigSchema(IrcConfigSchema, {
97	  uiHints: ircChannelConfigUiHints,
98	});
99

1	Here's a summary of the research and plan:
2	
3	---
4	
5	## Plan: PulseBoard Channel Plugin
6	
7	**25 new files**, all under `extensions/pulseboard/` — zero existing files modified.
8	
9	### Key Architectural Decisions
10	
11	| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
12	|----------|--------|-----------|
13	| Account model | Scoped multi-account (IRC pattern) | Matches the `channels.pulseboard.accounts.<id>` multi-account convention |
14	| Chat types | `["direct", "group"]` | DMs to `@username`, board posts to `!board-name` |
15	| Chunk limit | 4000 characters | As specified, via `chunkTextForOutbound` |
16	| Auth | API token (`apiToken` field + `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env) | Simple modern API auth |
17	| Plugin meta | Inline (no `getChatChannelMeta`) | `pulseboard` is not in `CHAT_CHANNEL_ORDER` in core `src/channels/ids.ts` — Nostr uses the same approach |
18	| `runtime-api.ts` | Direct imports from existing SDK subpaths | No `openclaw/plugin-sdk/pulseboard` subpath exists or can be created; map imports to `channel-config-schema`, `direct-dm`, `status-helpers`, `extension-shared`, etc. from `scripts/lib/plugin-sdk-entrypoints.json` |
19	
20	### File Summary
21

file.content:
Here's a summary of the research and plan:

---

## Plan: PulseBoard Channel Plugin

**25 new files**, all under `extensions/pulseboard/` — zero existing files modified.

### Key Architectural Decisions

| Decision | Choice | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| Account model | Scoped multi-account (IRC pattern) | Matches the `channels.pulseboard.accounts.<id>` multi-account convention |
| Chat types | `["direct", "group"]` | DMs to `@username`, board posts to `!board-name` |
| Chunk limit | 4000 characters | As specified, via `chunkTextForOutbound` |
| Auth | API token (`apiToken` field + `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env) | Simple modern API auth |
| Plugin meta | Inline (no `getChatChannelMeta`) | `pulseboard` is not in `CHAT_CHANNEL_ORDER` in core `src/channels/ids.ts` — Nostr uses the same approach |
| `runtime-api.ts` | Direct imports from existing SDK subpaths | No `openclaw/plugin-sdk/pulseboard` subpath exists or can be created; map imports to `channel-config-schema`, `direct-dm`, `status-helpers`, `extension-shared`, etc. from `scripts/lib/plugin-sdk-entrypoints.json` |

### File Summary

- **Manifest**: `openclaw.plugin.json`, `package.json`
- **Entry points**: `index.ts`, `setup-entry.ts`
- **Barrels**: `api.ts`, `runtime-api.ts`, `channel-config-api.ts`
- **Core source** (14 files): `types.ts`, `accounts.ts`, `config-schema.ts`, `config-ui-hints.ts`, `normalize.ts`, `runtime.ts`, `policy.ts`, `send.ts`, `inbound.ts`, `monitor.ts`, `probe.ts`, `setup-core.ts`, `setup-surface.ts`, `channel.ts`
- **Tests** (4 files): `channel.test.ts`, `accounts.test.ts`, `normalize.test.ts`, `config-schema.test.ts`

### Primary Reference Files
- `extensions/irc/src/channel.ts` — main structural template (scoped accounts, group + DM support)
- `extensions/nostr/src/channel.ts` — inline meta pattern (no `getChatChannelMeta`)
- `src/plugin-sdk/irc.ts` + `src/plugin-sdk/nostr.ts` — authoritative re-export source paths for runtime types

1	import {
2	  buildChannelConfigSchema,
3	  BlockStreamingCoalesceSchema,
4	  DmConfigSchema,
5	  DmPolicySchema,
6	  GroupPolicySchema,
7	  MarkdownConfigSchema,
8	  ReplyRuntimeConfigSchemaShape,
9	  ToolPolicySchema,
10	  requireOpenAllowFrom,
11	} from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/channel-config-schema";
12	import { z } from "openclaw/plugin-sdk/zod";
13	import { ircChannelConfigUiHints } from "./config-ui-hints.js";
14	
15	const IrcGroupSchema = z
16	  .object({
17	    requireMention: z.boolean().optional(),
18	    tools: ToolPolicySchema,
19	    toolsBySender: z.record(z.string(), ToolPolicySchema).optional(),
20	    skills: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
21	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
22	    allowFrom: z.array(z.union([z.string(), z.number()])).optional(),
23	    systemPrompt: z.string().optional(),
24	  })
25	  .strict();
26	
27	const IrcNickServSchema = z
28	  .object({
29	    enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
30	    service: z.string().optional(),
31	    password: z.string().optional(),

## PulseBoard channel plugin — complete ✅

All **25 new files** created under `extensions/pulseboard/` — zero existing files modified.

### File inventory

| Layer | Files |
|---|---|
| **Manifests** | `package.json`, `openclaw.plugin.json` |
| **Entry points** | `index.ts`, `setup-entry.ts` |
| **Barrels** | `api.ts`, `channel-config-api.ts` |
| **Core source (14)** | `src/runtime-api.ts`, `src/types.ts`, `src/runtime.ts`, `src/accounts.ts`, `src/config-schema.ts`, `src/config-ui-hints.ts`, `src/normalize.ts`, `src/policy.ts`, `src/send.ts`, `src/inbound.ts`, `src/monitor.ts`, `src/probe.ts`, `src/setup-core.ts`, `src/setup-surface.ts`, `src/channel.ts` |
| **Tests (4)** | `src/channel.test.ts`, `src/accounts.test.ts`, `src/normalize.test.ts`, `src/config-schema.test.ts` |

### Key design decisions implemented

- **Account model**: Scoped multi-account (`channels.pulseboard.accounts.<id>`) following the IRC pattern
- **Chat types**: `["direct", "group"]` — DMs to `@username`/`username`, board posts to `!board-name`
- **Chunk limit**: 4000 characters via `chunkTextForOutbound` with `chunkerMode: "length"`
- **Auth**: API token via `apiToken` config field or `PULSEBOARD_TOKEN` env var (default account only)
- **Plugin meta**: Inline (no `getChatChannelMeta` call — `pulseboard` is not in core's `CHAT_CHANNEL_ORDER`)
- **`src/runtime-api.ts`**: Imports mapped to individual SDK subpaths (`channel-pairing`, `reply-chunking`, `runtime-group-policy`, `status-helpers`, etc.) since no `openclaw/plugin-sdk/pulseboard` subpath exists
- **Monitor**: REST polling loop against `GET /api/v1/messages/poll?since={ts}&boards={...}` every 3 s
- **Send**: HTTP `POST` to `/api/v1/boards/{name}/messages` or `/api/v1/dms/{username}`
- **Probe**: HTTP `GET /api/v1/user/me` with latency measurement
- **Security**: Full group-policy + DM-policy + pairing flow mirroring the IRC inbound handler
